name: Citi Private Bank
ai_strategy_summary: Citi deployed AskWealth AI to North America advisors in Q4 2025 and expanded internationally in Q1 2026. A dedicated AI infrastructure group and strategic investment in Sakana AI signal a long-term, foundational approach to AI capability building.
headline_metric: AskWealth live globally, Sakana AI strategic investment
headline_initiative: AskWealth generative AI + Sakana AI investment

advisor_productivity.headline: AskWealth deployed to advisors globally as of Q1 2026
advisor_productivity.detail: Citi Private Bank deployed AskWealth, a generative AI assistant for advisory teams, to North America in Q4 2025 and expanded to international colleagues in Q1 2026. The tool provides market insights, research synthesis, and client communication support.
evidence: Advisor Insights ML dashboard in pilot
advisor_productivity.jpm_implication: Citi has achieved global AI advisor deployment slightly ahead of JPM in some markets. Speed of rollout is a competitive signal.

research_content.headline: AI-generated market insights and research synthesis for private banking teams
research_content.detail: AskWealth provides market intelligence synthesis and Advisor Insights offers an ML-based markets update dashboard, currently in pilot for private banking advisors.
research_content.jpm_implication: Citi's research AI is live. JPM's comparative research delivery speed should be benchmarked.

new_business_models.headline: Strategic investment in Sakana AI for nature-inspired foundational models
new_business_models.detail: Citi made a strategic investment in Sakana AI, a Tokyo-based company developing nature-inspired AI foundational models. This is Citi's first investment in a Japan-based AI company and signals interest in novel AI architectures beyond current LLMs.
evidence: First Citi investment in Japan AI company
new_business_models.jpm_implication: Citi is investing in next-generation AI architectures. JPM's AI research investment strategy should consider similar early-stage positioning.
